blocking_issues: Free-form String inline phrases such as '问纳博特 {prompt}' fail real App Shortcuts metadata validation; v1 currently supports only the follow-up Siri phrase.

Simulator Siri can execute built-in commands such as 'Open Safari', but the supported custom Voice Bridge phrase still does not trigger AskBridgeIntent in UI tests; simulator Siri cannot replace real-device Siri acceptance.
The real-device UI smoke test originally hard-coded 127.0.0.1 as the backend URL; device runs now require a host-provided LAN base URL such as http://192.168.3.79:8900.
The iOS app now needs ATS allowance for the self-hosted HTTP nanobot endpoint; this was patched, regenerated, and still needs final real-device rerun.
The physical iPhone disappeared from Xcode destinations during the latest rerun, so end-to-end device smoke and Siri acceptance remain blocked on reconnecting the device to this Mac.
